record.candidate_surface: later formation, persistence, re-entry, cost, or susceptibility under the candidate medium-history condition
record.comparator_surface: the matched reference, medium-freeze, active-null, or declared lane control for the same seed and configuration
record.denominator_definition: maximum absolute magnitude of the paired reference and comparator responses, bounded below by measurement_resolution
record.numerator_definition: candidate later-response value minus its matched comparator later-response value

delta.rationale: No candidate-blind matched-null calibration has executed

record.zero_denominator_policy: Use measurement_resolution as the denominator floor and record resolution_limited when both paired response magnitudes remain at that floor
